codeReview.summary: The implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. It successfully integrates search into the public reading shell, adds safe boundary parsing with Zod via `SearchResponseSchema`, disambiguates identical document names using space and version contexts, and correctly maps all non-success view states (loading, empty, error, validation-error) without leaking stale data. Comprehensive tests and a Playwright smoke test were also successfully added.

summary: Passed review: Implementation correctly exposes search with robust error boundary handling, UI context disambiguation, and route synchronization. Tests and verification steps were thoroughly executed following the defined skill procedure.
